name: Picnic
overview: The series introduces us to the Lapin family. The marital relationship between Vera and Oleg is far from ideal, because of the fire of their love left only ashes. Oleg's next birthday will begin with a rather unpleasant surprise - the dismissal of the lawyer. Last hopes in the series Picnic birthday boy will pin on a friendly atmosphere in the company of old friends and tranquil nature. But the evening will prepare a present from which later all present will freeze the blood... After this fateful night, the life of the heroes will never be the same. Witness this tense moment to learn why you should not play silent with your inner doubts and closest people.

trailers.title: Сериал Пикник – Тизер. Смотрите с 6 сентября на СТБ!
